meaning: n.[动]猫声鸟,猫鹊(产于北美的一种鸣禽)
examples: If he had not been hurt, his team would be sitting in the catbird seat.
More than a catbird hates a cat.
Joe enjoys sitting in the catbird seat.
And Salesforce seems to be in a catbird position compared with any company I can think of.
Sitting in the catbird seat is Nike, which dresses Woods and provides his clubs and ball.
